# Contribution Guidelines
The full description on how to submit new data is available in the documentation (link below). 


The following sections will contain links to:

1. Forms for the submission of new data
2. Prefilled links for existing content, this can be used for modification, or adaption when submitting/reusing entries. 


Please ensure that any additions or modifications to controlled vocabularies adhere to the established standards and formats. Refer to the [Documentation](https://emd.mipcvs.dev/doc) for guidance.


## 1. Submitting New Controlled Vocabularies

The following forms are available for this repository, and can be used to add or modify entries. The complete submission pipeline (if applicable) will be outlined in the section above.

### Stage 1 - Grid Cells

### Stage 2 - Computational Grids

- [horizontal_computational_grid](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=horizontal_computational_grid.yml)
- [vertical_computational_grid](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=vertical_computational_grid.yml)
### Stage 3 - Components

- [model_component](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml)
- [link_existing_component](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=link_existing_component.yml)
### Stage 4 - Model

- [model](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml)
### Supporting

- [model_family](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_family.yml)
- [modify](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=modify.yml)
- [general_issue](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=general_issue.yml)
### Ungrouped Forms

- [horizontal_grid_cell](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=horizontal_grid_cell.yml)

## 2. Modifying or reusing existing entries

The following links will open pre-filled GitHub issues with content from the selected files. These can be used to update entries or make new ones.

- [h116](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=horizontal_computational_grid.yml&title=Modify%3A+Horizontal+Computational+Grid%3A+h116&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&description=A+regular+latitude-longitude+grid+on+an+Arakawa-C+staggering+for+atmospheric+modeling+in+IAP-AGCM+and+IAP-HAGCM+%28CAS-ESM%29.+The+mass+%28thermodynamic%29+subgrid+has+dimensions+256+%28longitude%29+%C3%97+128+%28latitude%29%2C+including+grid+points+at+both+the+North+and+South+Poles.+The+zonal+velocity+%28u%29+subgrid+is+staggered+eastward+by+half+a+grid+cell%2C+and+the+meridional+velocity+%28v%29+subgrid+is+staggered+northward+by+half+a+grid+cell.+The+nominal+horizontal+resolution+is+approximately+1.4%C2%B0+%C3%97+1.4%C2%B0%2C+corresponding+to+a+longitudinal+spacing+of+360%C2%B0%2F256+%3D+1.40625%C2%B0+and+a+latitudinal+spacing+of+approximately+1.417%C2%B0+%28180%C2%B0+divided+by+127+intervals+between+the+two+poles%29+between+adjacent+mass+grid+points.&arrangement=%22arakawa-c%22)

[ACCESS-ESM1-6](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+ACCESS-ESM1-6&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=ACCESS-ESM1-6&calendar=%22proleptic-gregorian%22&family=%22access-esm%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22%2C%22Land+Ice%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27aerosol%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1071%2FES19035&description=The+model+is+an+updated+version+of+ACCESS-ESM1-5%2C+as+used+for+CMIP6+%28Ziehn+et+al.%2C+2020%29.+Its+dynamic+components+are+the+UK+Met+Office+Unified+Model+atmosphere+%28v7.3%29+in+a+configuration+similar+to+HadGEM2+including+CLASSIC+aerosols%2C+with+the+CABLE+land+surface+model+%28v3%29+including+land+biogeochemistry.+The+atmosphere+is+coupled+to+the+MOM5+ocean+with+WOMBATlite+biogeochemistry+and+CICE5+sea-ice+using+the+OASIS-MCT+coupler.+Chemistry+is+prescribed+including+monthly+mean%2C+zonally-averaged+ozone.+Volcano+forcing+is+prescribed+as+stratospheric+optical+depth+as+monthly+means+in+four+equal+area+latitude+bands.+Land-ice+is+represented+by+an+ice+tile+in+the+land+surface+model.+A+grid-cell+is+either+completely+ice+or+ice-free+and+the+ice+tile+distribution+does+not+change+in+time.+The+main+differences+from+ACCESS-ESM1.5+include+corrections+to+how+convective+momentum+transport+had+been+applied+in+the+atmosphere%2C+a+change+to+ocean+albedo+to+better+match+observations%2C+a+correction+to+the+passing+of+ocean+carbon+fluxes+into+the+atmosphere%2C+updates+to+improve+energy+and+water+conservation+across+the+land+and+atmosphere%2C+inclusion+of+3+new+plant+functional+types+%28c4+crops+and+two+Australian+tree+types%29%2C+improvements+to+the+treatment+of+land-use+change%2C+updates+to+some+of+the+land+parameterisations+or+parameter+values%2C+the+inclusion+of+a+pseudo-iceberg+scheme+for+distributing+runoff+from+Antarctica+and+Greenland+and+a+substantial+update+to+ocean-biogeochemistry.+Many+aspects+of+the+model+infrastructure+have+also+been+improved+to+ensure+greater+provenance%2C+better+support+for+users+and+enhanced+model+throughput.+A+manuscript+describing+ACCESS-ESM1.6+is+in+preparation+%28Ziehn+et+al.%29.)

- [AWI-ESM3-4-2-veg-HR](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+AWI-ESM3-4-2-veg-HR&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=AWI-ESM3-4-2-veg-HR&calendar=%22proleptic-gregorian%22&family=%22awi-esm3%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22%2C%22land-surface%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=%22Land+Ice%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-6399-2022%2C+%22AWI-ESM3%2C+Earth%2C+system%2C+model%2C+for%2C+the%2C+Coupled%2C+Model%2C+Intercomparison%2C+Project%2C+7%22%2C+%28Streffing%2C+et%2C+al.%2C+in%2C+preparation%2C+target%2C+GMD%2C+2027%29&description=AWI-ESM3-veg+is+the+third+generation+of+the+AWI+Earth+System+Model%2C+configured+here+in+its+high+resolution+variant+with+dynamic+vegetation.+It+is+a+successor+to+the+AWI-CM3+system+described+in+Streffing+et+al.+%282022%2C+doi%3A10.5194%2Fgmd-15-6399-2022%29%2C+now+with+updated+atmosphere+and+ocean+cycles+plus+the+addition+of+LPJ-GUESS+for+dynamic+vegetation.+The+components+are+coupled+through+OASIS3-MCT5.++1.+Dynamic+components+Atmosphere%3A+OpenIFS+48r1+on+a+TCO319+reduced+Gaussian+grid+with+137+hybrid+sigma-pressure+levels.+Ocean%3A+FESOM2.7+on+the+DARS2+unstructured+triangular+mesh+of+about+3.15+M+surface+vertices+and+6.23+M+elements%2C+on+57+z-levels.+Horizontal+resolution+varies+from+about+5+km+in+dynamically+active+regions+to+about+25+km+in+the+bulk+interior.+Sea+ice%3A+FESIM2.7+with+zero-layer+thermodynamics%2C+embedded+in+FESOM2+and+sharing+its+surface+mesh.+Land+surface+and+dynamic+vegetation%3A+LPJ-GUESS+4.1%2C+running+on+the+OpenIFS+horizontal+grid.++2.+Prescribed+components+Tropospheric+anthropogenic+aerosol%3A+MACv2-SP+%28Stevens+et+al.+2017%29%2C+the+simple-plumes+climatology+that+supplies+direct+and+first+indirect+aerosol+effects+from+a+prescribed+plume+description.+Stratospheric+aerosol%3A+prescribed+from+the+CMIP7+stratospheric+aerosol+forcing+dataset.+Atmospheric+chemistry%3A+not+interactive%3B+ozone+is+taken+from+the+CMIP7+ozone+forcing+dataset.+Greenhouse+gases%3A+prescribed+concentrations+throughout.++3.+Omitted+components+Ocean+biogeochemistry%3A+REcoM+is+planned+to+couple+into+FESOM2+in+a+future+submission+within+the+awi-esm3+family%2C+but+is+not+part+of+this+fast-track+configuration.+Dynamic+land-ice%3A+PISM+is+planned+to+couple+into+AWI-ESM3+in+a+future+submission%2C+but+is+not+part+of+this+fast-track+configuration.)

- [CanESM5-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+CanESM5-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=CanESM5-1&calendar=%22365-day%22&family=%22CanESM%22&release_year=2022&prescribed_components=%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22%2C%22Land+Ice%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Aerosol%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27aerosol%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-14-6863-2021%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-4393-2022%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-6553-2023&description=CanESM5-1+is+a+fully+coupled+atmosphere-ocean-land+ESM%2C+which+is+scientifically+very+similar+to+CanESM5%2C+and+includes+major+technical+upgrades+within+the+model+components%2C+as+well+as+addressing+some+key+scientific+issues%2C+like+stratospheric+dust+spikes.)

- [CanESM6-0-MR](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+CanESM6-0-MR&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=CanESM6-0-MR&calendar=%22365-day%22&family=%22CanESM%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22%2C%22Land+Ice%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Aerosol%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27aerosol%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-4393-2022%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fbg-20-1313-2023%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-13-2825-2020&description=CanESM6-0-MR+is+a+fully+coupled+ESM+developed+by+CCCma+with+a+nominal+resolution+of+1+degree.+It+includes+the+Canadian+Atmospheric+Model+version+6+%28CanAM6%29%2C+based+on+the+GEM+dynamical+core+and+Yin+Yang+grids%2C+with+the+Canadian+Land+Surface+Scheme+including+Biogeochemical+Cycles+%28CLASSICv1.5%29+embedded.+The+ocean+is+represented+via+an+adapted+version+of+the+NEMO4.2.2+ocean+model+with+the+Canadian+Model+of+Ocean+Carbon+%28CMOC%29+and+the+NEMO+Sea+Ice+Engine+%28SI3%29+embedded+on+the+eORCA1+grid.+The+model+components+are+coupled+together+based+on+a+bespoke+Canadian+Coupler+%28CanCPL%29%2C+built+on+the+ESMF+infrastructure.+This+version+of+the+model+does+not+simulate+prognostic+atmospheric-chemistry.+Land+ice+is+specified+and+static.)

- [UKCM2-0-LL](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+UKCM2-0-LL&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=UKCM2-0-LL&calendar=%22standard%22&family=%22UKCM%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Land+Ice%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22&dynamic_components=%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27aerosol%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22&omitted_components=%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fegusphere-2026-1676&description=UKCM2-0-LL+includes+dynamically+evolving+MetUM+GA9+dynamical+atmosphere+with+the+embedded+GLOMAP-mode+aerosol+scheme+coupled+to+the+JULES++GL9+land+surface+and+the+GOSI9+configuration+of+the+NEMO+ocean+and+the+embedded+SI3+sea-ice+model.++Land+ice+is+represented+through+JULES.+The+ice+surface+is+taken+to+be+one+of+the+surface+tile+types%2C+and+all+surface+tiles+share+the+same+soil+information+for+temperature+and+moisture+in+JULES.+The+specification+of+land-ice+gridboxes+is+done+through+the+tile+fractions+information.+Atmospheric+chemistry.+UKCM2-0-LL+has+a+very+simplified+treatment+of+aerosol+chemistry+using+prescribed+trace+gas+oxidants.+GHGs%2FCFCs+are+prescribed+from+CMIP7+forcings+as+annual+mean+global+constant+values.++UKCM2-0-LL+does+not+include+an+ocean-biogeochemistry+model.)

- [cnrm-esm2-1e](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+cnrm-esm2-1e&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&component_configs=%22atmosphere_arpege-climat-version-6-3_h100_v100%22%2C%22land-surface_surfex-v8-modeling-platform_h100_v101%22%2C%22ocean_nemo-v3-6_h101_v102%22%2C%22aerosol_tactic_h100_v100%22%2C%22atmospheric-chemistry_reprobus-c-v2-0_h100_v100%22%2C%22sea-ice_gelato_h101_v103%22%2C%22ocean-biogeochemistry_piscesv2-gas_h101_v102%22&name=CNRM-ESM2-1e&calendar=%22standard%22&family=%22CNRM-CM%22&release_year=2018&prescribed_components=&dynamic_components=%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27atmosphere%27%2C+%27aerosol%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27atmosphere%27%2C+%27atmospheric-chemistry%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean%27%2C+%27sea-ice%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean%27%2C+%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%5D%22&omitted_components=%22Land+Ice%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001791%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001683&description=CNRM-ESM2-1e+is+the+CNRM+Earth+System+model+version+2+designed+for+CMIP6+on+the+basis+of+the+physical+core+CNRM-CM6-1+%28Voldoire+et+al.+2019%29.+In+concentration+mode%2C+it+is+the+same+model+as+CNRM-ESM2-1+%28S%C3%A9f%C3%A9rian+et+al.+2019%29%2C+it+only+differs+from+CNRM-ESM2-1+in+emission-driven+mode+%28see+Bossert+et+al.+2026%29.+The+main+adaptations+consist+in+a+better+conservation+of+the+carbon+in+all+the+components+leading+to+a+more+consistent%2Frealistic+carbon+flux+evolution+in+historical+simulations.)

- [ec-earth3-esm-1-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+ec-earth3-esm-1-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=ec-earth3-esm-1-1&calendar=%22proleptic-gregorian%22&family=%22ec-earth%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Aerosol%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Land+Ice%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=&references=https%3A%2F%2Fin-preperation.2026%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-2973-2022&description=The+Earth+System+Model+EC-Earth3-ESM+is+a+post-CMIP6+development+of+the+EC-Earth3+model.+It+comprises+a+coupled+atmosphere-ocean+model+%28including+sea+ice%29%2C+dynamic+vegetation%2C+an+ice+sheet+model+for+Greenland+and+an+Antarctic+Ice+Meltwater+emulator.+The+model+can+be+run+in+concentration+driven+mode+or+with+CO2+emissions%2C+featuring+a+carbon+cycle.++1.+The+dynamic+components+are%3A+Atmosphere+%28IFS%29+including+the+soil+component+%28HTESSEL%29%2C+Ocean+%28with+embedded+Sea+Ice+%28LIM3%29+%26+Ocean+Biogeochemistry+%28PISCES%29+components%29+%2C+Land+Surface+%26+Subsurface+Dynamic+Vegetation+%28LPJ-GUESS%29%2C+Land+Ice+for+Greenland+%28PISM%29.+Further%2C+a+simple+yet+fast+atmosphere+CO2+box+model++%28one+global+grid+point%29+for+closing+the+carbon+cycle+is+used.+2.+The+Atmospheric+Chemistry+and+Aerosols+are+prescribed.+3.+The+Antarctic+Ice+sheet+is+not+modeled+itself%2C++instead+an+emulator+for+simulating+the+Antarctic+meltwater+flux+%28on+the+ocean+grid%29+is+in+place.)

- [mri-esm3-4](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+mri-esm3-4&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=mri-esm3-4&calendar=%22proleptic-gregorian%22&family=%22%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Land+Ice%22&dynamic_components=%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27ocean-biogeochemistry%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22&omitted_components=&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.20839616&description=MRI-ESM3.4+is+a+fully+coupled+ESM+developed+by+MRI%2FJMA.+It+consists+of+four+major+component+models+coupled+through+the+Scup+coupler%3A+an+atmospheric+general+circulation+model+%28MRI-AGCM4.4%29+with+embedded+land+surface+processes+%28iSiB%29+and+terrestrial+biogeochemical+processes+%28MRI-LPJ-LCF1.0%29%2C+an+ocean%E2%80%93sea-ice+general+circulation+model+%28MRI.COM+version+5.4%29+with+embedded+ocean+biogeochemical+processes%2C+an+aerosol+model+%28MASINGAR+mk-3r2%29%2C+and+an+atmospheric+chemistry+model+%28MRI-CCM3.2%29.++Land+ice+is+specified+and+static.)

- [ukcm2a-0-hh](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model%3A+ukcm2a-0-hh&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=ukcm2a-0-hh&calendar=%22standard%22&family=%22UKCM%22&release_year=2026&prescribed_components=%22Land+Ice%22%2C%22Atmospheric+Chemistry%22&dynamic_components=%22Aerosol%22%2C%22Atmosphere%22%2C%22land-surface%22%2C%22Ocean%22%2C%22Sea+Ice%22&embedded_components=%22%5B%27aerosol%27%2C+%27atmosphere%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27sea-ice%27%2C+%27ocean%27%5D%22%2C%22%5B%27land-surface%27%2C+%27aerosol%27%5D%22&omitted_components=%22Ocean+Biogeochemistry%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.14288725&description=UKCM2a-0-HH+is+a+very-high+resolution+counterpart+to+UKCM2-0-LL+using+an+N640+atmosphere+grid+%2820+km+in+mid+latitudes%2C+31+km+at+the+equator%29+and+a+1%2F12+degree+%288+km%29+extended+ORCA+ocean+grid.+With+the+exception+of+the+COMORPH+A9+convection+scheme+this+model+is+otherwise+equivalent+to+UKCM2-0-LL.++UKCM2a-0-HH+includes+a+dynamically+evolving+MetUM+GA9a+dynamical+atmosphere+with+the+embedded+GLOMAP-mode+aerosol+scheme+coupled+to+the+JULES+GL9+land+surface+and+the+GOSI9+configuration+of+the+NEMO+ocean+and+the+embedded+SI3+sea-ice+model.++Land+ice+is+represented+through+JULES.+The+ice+surface+is+taken+to+be+one+of+the+surface+tile+types%2C+and+all+surface+tiles+share+the+same+soil+information+for+temperature+and+moisture+in+JULES.+The+specification+of+land+ice+gridboxes+is+done+through+the+tile+fractions+information.+Atmospheric+chemistry.+UKCM2a-0-HH+has+a+very+simplified+treatment+of+aerosol+chemistry+using+prescribed+trace+gas+oxidants.+GHGs%2FCFCs+are+prescribed+from+CMIP7+forcings+as+annual+mean+global+constant+values.++UKCM2a-0-HH+does+not+include+an+ocean+biogeochemistry+model.)

</details>

<details markdown="1" name="model_component">
<summary>Model Component (65 entries)</summary>

- [arpege-climat_version_6_3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+arpege-climat_version_6_3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=Arpege-Climat+Version+6.3&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2020MS002075&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22arpege-climat%22&description=ARPEGE-Climat+Version+6.3+is+the+atmospheric+component+of+the+CNRM+climate+and+Earth+System+models+%28CNRM-CM6-1+and+CNRM-ESM2-1%29.&code_base=private)

- [bcc-avim3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+bcc-avim3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2F+doi%3A+10.1007%2Fs13351-019-9016-y+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.accre.2023.02.001&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22%22&description=BCC%E2%80%91AVIM3+is+an+upgraded+version+of+BCC%E2%80%91AVIM2%2C+serving+as+the+land+surface+component+of+BCC%E2%80%91CSM2.+It+comprises+three+sub%E2%80%91modules+that+simulate+biogeophysical%2C+ecophysiological%2C+and+soil+carbon%E2%80%93nitrogen+dynamic+processes.+The+terrestrial+carbon+cycle+is+represented+through+a+series+of+biochemical+and+physiological+processes+associated+with+vegetation+photosynthesis+and+respiration.+Carbohydrate+allocation+to+leaves%2C+stems%2C+and+roots+varies+seasonally%2C+depending+on+the+prognostic+leaf+area+index+%28LAI%29.+Parameterization+in+BCC%E2%80%91AVIM3+has+been+improved+in+several+key+areas%2C+including+snow+cover%2C+soil+freeze%E2%80%93thaw+dynamics%2C+rice+paddy+fields+and+ground+energy+balance.+Additional+enhancements+include+the+treatment+of+organic+matter+and+a+prognostic+phenology+scheme+based+on+the+carbon+budget+of+plant+functional+types.&code_base=private)

- [bisicles-ukesm-ismip6-1_0](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+bisicles-ukesm-ismip6-1_0&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=BISICLES-UKESM-ISMIP6-1.0&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2021MS002520&component=%22land-ice%22&family=%22BISICLES%22&description=UniCiCles+%28Unified+Model-CISM-BISICLES%29+is+a+package+combining+BISICLES+with+an+interface+that+obtains+boundary+conditions+from+Unified+Model+or+JULES+data.&code_base=none)

- [bisicles-ukesm1-3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+bisicles-ukesm1-3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2021MS002520&component=%22land-ice%22&family=%22BISICLES%22&description=BISICLES-UKESM1.3+is+a+tagged+version+of+UniCiCles+%28Unified+Model-CISM-BISICLES%29%2C+a+package+combining+BISICLES+with+an+interface+that+obtains+boundary+conditions+from+Unified+Model+or+JULES+data%2C+using+code+derived+from+the+Glint+interface+of+the+Glimmer-CISM+ISM.+BISICLES+uses+the+adaptive-mesh+Chombo+libraries.+All+cells+in+the+mesh+are+rectangles+that+may+be+recursively+refined+by+subdivision+into+four+smaller+cells+with+the+same+aspect+ratio.+The+configuration+of+BISICLES+approximates+the+momentum+equations+using+the+%E2%80%9Cshelfy-stream%E2%80%9D+approximation+with+simplified+vertical+shear+strains+included+in+the+effective+viscosity%2C+often+referred+to+as+SSA%2A.+Basal+traction+is+set+to+zero+beneath+floating+ice+and+modelled+using+power+laws+beneath+grounded+ice.+Greenland+ice+sheet+uses+a+linear+drag+law+everywhere+while+AIS+uses+a+cubic+law+far+upstream+from+the+grounding+line%2C+which+tends+to+a+Coulomb+friction+law+near+the+grounding+line.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2Fcpom-land-ice-modelling)

- [cable3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+cable3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.4225%2F08%2F58615c6a9a51d%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2FS0168-1923%2898%2900061-6%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1071%2FES19035%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fbg-7-2261-2010&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22cable%22&description=The+CABLE+model+%28Kowalczyk+et+al%2C+2006%3B+Wang+and+Leuning%2C+1998%29+is+embedded+in+the+atmosphere+and+replaces+most+parts+of+the+MOSES+land+model+%28the+default+land+surface+model+in+the+UM7.3%29.+Dust+source%2C+topographic+drag+and+river+routing+remain+as+per+MOSES.++Each+grid-cell+is+divided+into+a+variable+number+of+vegetated+%28up+to+13%29+and+non-vegetated+%28up+to+3%29+tiles.+Each+tile+is+independent+and+has+its+own+soil+column+and+up+to+three+snow+layers.+Tile+fractions+are+prescribed+and+change+over+time+to+account+for+land-use+change.+Compared+to+ACCESS-ESM1-5+%28Ziehn+et+al.%2C+2020%29%2C+three+new+vegetated+tiles+are+included+%28C4+crops+and+two+Australian-specific+tree+types%29.+Land+biogeochemistry+is+included+using+the+CASA-CNP+module+%28Wang+et+al.%2C+2010%29+simulating+carbon%2C+nitrogen+and+phosphorus+cycles.+Lakes+are+not+explicitly+simulated+-+lake+tiles+are+permanently+saturated+soil+columns+with+no+vegetation.+Wetlands%2C+lake+and+ice+tiles+are+invariant+and+grid-cells+%28primarily+Antarctica+and+Greenland%29+are+either+completely+ice+or+ice-free.+CABLE+code%2C+choice+of+parameterisations+and+some+parameter+values+have+been+updated+relative+to+ACCESS-ESM1-5.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FCABLE-LSM%2FCABLE%2Freleases%2Ftag%2F2025.11.000)

- [canam5-1-aerosol](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+canam5-1-aerosol&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22canam%22&description=Aerosols+in+CanAM5.1+are+parameterized+using+a+prognostic+scheme+for+bulk+concentrations+of+natural+and+anthropogenic+aerosols%2C+including+sulfate%2C+black+and+organic+carbon%2C+sea+salt%2C+and+mineral+dust%3B+parameterizations+for+emissions%2C+transport%2C+gas-phase+and+aqueous-phase+chemistry%3B+and+dry+and+wet+deposition+account+for+interactions+with+simulated+meteorology.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcanam)

- [canam5-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+canam5-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22canam%22&description=CanAM5.1+%28T63L49+native+atmosphere%2C+T63+Linear+Gaussian+Grid%3B+128+x+64+longitude%2Flatitude%3B+49+levels%3B+top+level+1+hPa.++Aerosols+are+parameterized+using+a+prognostic+scheme+for+bulk+concentrations+of+natural+and+anthropogenic+aerosols%2C+including+sulfate%2C+black+and+organic+carbon%2C+sea+salt%2C+and+mineral+dust%3B+parameterizations+for+emissions%2C+transport%2C+gas-phase+and+aqueous-phase+chemistry%3B+and+dry+and+wet+deposition+account+for+interactions+with+simulated+meteorology.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcanam)

- [canam6-aerosol](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+canam6-aerosol&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22canam%22&description=Aerosols+in+CanAM6+are+parameterized+using+a+prognostic+scheme+for+bulk+concentrations+of+natural+and+anthropogenic+aerosols+including+sulfate%2C+black+and+organic+carbon%2C+sea+salt%2C+and+mineral+dust%3B+parameterizations+for+emissions%2C+transport%2C+gas-phase+and+aqueous-phase+chemistry%3B+and+dry+and+wet+deposition+account+for+interactions+with+simulated+meteorology.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcanam)

- [canam6](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+canam6&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22canam%22&description=Canadian+Atmospheric+Model+version+6+%28CanAM6%29%2C+based+on+the+CanAM6+physics+package+and+the+GEM+dynamical+core%2C+discretized+on+1+degree+Yin+Yang+grids.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcanam)

- [cannemo5-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+cannemo5-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22cannemo%22&description=CanNEMO+introduces+modifications+to+mesoscale+and+small-scale+mixing+physics+to+NEMO3.4.1+%28ORCA1+tripolar+grid%2C+1+deg+with+refinement+to+1%2F3+deg+within+20+degrees+of+the+equator%3B+360+x+291+longitude%2Flatitude%3B+45+vertical+levels%3B+top+grid+cell+0-6.19+m%29&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcannemo)

- [cannemo6-0](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+cannemo6-0&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-6553-2023+CanESM6+model+description+paper+in+preparation+%28Sep%2FOct+2026%29&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22cannemo%22&description=Adapted+version+of+NEMO4.2.2+on+the+eORCA1+grid&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcannemo)

- [cice5](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+cice5&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.19207490&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22%22&description=The+ice+model+has+a+zero+layer+thermodynamic+model+that+computes+local+growth+rates+of+snow+and+sea+ice+due+to+vertical+conductive%2C+radiative+and+turbulent+fluxes%2C+along+with+snowfall+on+sea+ice%3B+the+ice%2Fsnow+surface+temperature+is+controlled+by+the+UM+atmospheric+component.+The+model+represents+the+ice+dynamics%2C+which+predicts+the+velocity+field+of+the+ice+pack+based+on+a+model+of+the+material+strength+of+the+ice%3B++and+uses+the+EVP+%28elastic-viscous-plastic%29+rheology.+An+incremental+remapping+scheme+is+used+for+the+advection+of+the+areal+concentration%2C+sea+ice+volumes+and+other+state+variables%3B+mechanical+redistribution+of+the+ice+is+carried+out+by+a+ridging+parameterization+that+transfers+sea+ice+among+the+five+ice+thickness+categories+based+on+energetic+balances+and+rates+of+strain+within+the+ice.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FACCESS-NRI%2Fcice5%2Freleases%2Ftag%2F2026.01.000)

- [class-ctem-v3-6-2](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+class-ctem-v3-6-2&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-16-5427-2023&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22class-ctem%22&description=CLASS3.6%2FCTEM1.2+simulate+the+physical+and+biogeochemical+land+surface+processes%2C+respectively%2C+and+together+they+calculate+fluxes+of+energy%2C+water%2C+CO2%2C+and+wetland+CH4+emissions+at+the+land%E2%80%93atmosphere+boundary.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcanam)

- [classic](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+classic&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2011JD016074&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22%22&description=The+aerosol+module+is+the+Coupled+Large-scale+Aerosol+Simulator+for+Studies+In+Climate+%28CLASSIC%29+as+in+HadGEM2+%28Bellouin+et+al.%2C+2011%29.+It+represents+tropospheric+aerosol+species%3A++sulphate%2C+mineral+dust%2C+sea+salt%2C+fossil+fuel+black+carbon%2C+fossil+fuel+organic+carbon%2C+biomass+burning+aerosols%2C+secondary+organic+%28also+called+biogenic%29+aerosols.+Emissions+of+mineral+dust+and+sea+salt+are+interactive.+Emissions+for+other+species+or+their+precursors+are+prescribed.+Transported+species+experience+boundary+layer+and+convective+mixing+and+are+removed+by+dry+and+wet+deposition.&code_base=private)

- [classicv1-5](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+classicv1-5&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-13-2825-2020+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fbg-20-1313-2023&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22CLASSIC%22&description=The+Canadian+Land+Surface+Scheme+Including+Biogeochemical+Cycles+%28CLASSIC%29+land+model+is+the+successor+to+and+is+based+on+the+coupled+Canadian+Land+Surface+Scheme+%28CLASS%29+and+the+Canadian+Terrestrial+Ecosystem+Model+%28CTEM%29.+The+basis+of+the+modelling+of+physical+and+biogeochemical+processes+in+CLASSIC+comes+from+CLASS+and+CTEM%2C+respectively%2C+both+of+which+have+a+long+history+of+development.+CLASSIC+simulates+land%E2%80%93atmosphere+fluxes+of+water%2C+energy%2C+and+momentum+based+on+its+physics+and+fluxes+of+CO2%2C+CH4%2C+N2O%2C+NOx%2C+and+NH3+based+on+its+biogeochemical+processes.+The+representation+of+the+terrestrial+N+cycle+is+a+new+addition+to+CLASSIC+and+allows+for+the+simulation+of+the+interactions+between+the+C+and+N+cycles+explicitly.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fclassic)

- [clm4](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+clm4&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=CLM4&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-5-1341-2012&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22CLM%22&description=The+Community+Land+Model+represents+several+aspects+of+the+land+surface+including+surface+heterogeneity+through+a+nested+subgrid+hierarchy.&code_base=none)

- [cmoc](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+cmoc&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-4393-2022&component=%22ocean-biogeochemistry%22&family=%22cmoc%22&description=The+Canadian+Model+of+Ocean+Carbon+%28CMOC%29+includes+carbon+chemistry+and+biology.+The+biological+component+is+a+simple+nutrient%E2%80%93phytoplankton%E2%80%93zooplankton%E2%80%93detritus+%28NPZD%29+model%2C+with+fixed+Redfield+stoichiometry%2C+and+simple+parameterizations+of+iron+limitation%2C+nitrogen+fixation%2C+and+export+flux+of+calcium+carbonate.+CMOC+was+migrated+into+the+NEMO+modelling+system%2C+and+the+following+important+modifications+were+made%3A+%28i%29+oxygen+was+added+as+a+passive+tracer+with+no+feedback+on+biology%3B+%28ii%29+carbon+chemistry+routines+were+updated+to+conform+to+the+OMIP-BGC+protocol+%28Orr+et+al.%2C+2017%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-10-2169-2017%29%3B+%28iii%29+additional+passive+tracers+requested+by+OMIP+were+added%2C+including+natural+and+abiotic+dissolved+inorganic+carbon+%28DIC%29+as+well+as+the+inert+tracers+%28CFC11%2C+CFC12%2C+and+SF6%29.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.com%2Fcccma%2Fcannemo)

- [co2box-v1-0](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+co2box-v1-0&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=A+description+paper+for+the+EC-Earth3-ESM-1+model+configuration+is+in+preparation+%28submission+medio+2026%29.&component=%22atmospheric-chemistry%22&family=%22%22&description=The+co2box+v1.0+is+a+simple+CO2+box+model+with+just+one+global+grid+point.&code_base=)

- [colm2014](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+colm2014&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-7-2039-2014+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2020MS002210&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22CoLM%22&description=The+Common+Land+Model+%28CoLM%29+is+a+process-based+land+surface+model+designed+to+represent+exchanges+of+energy%2C+water%2C+momentum%2C+and+carbon+between+the+land+surface+and+the+atmosphere.+It+simulates+the+major+terrestrial+processes+relevant+to+climate+and+Earth-system+modeling%2C+including+canopy+radiation+transfer%2C+photosynthesis+and+stomatal+conductance%2C+evapotranspiration%2C+soil+heat+and+moisture+transport%2C+snow+accumulation+and+melt%2C+frozen-soil+hydrology%2C+runoff+generation%2C+terrestrial+carbon+cycling%2C+and+land%E2%80%93atmosphere+CO2+exchange.+In+coupled+Earth+system+applications%2C+CoLM+also+supports+dynamic+vegetation%2C+fire-related+processes%2C+and+interactions+with+atmospheric+dust+and+biogeochemical+modules.++A+key+feature+of+CoLM+is+its+physically+based+treatment+of+land+heterogeneity+and+vegetation%E2%80%93soil+processes.+The+model+originated+by+integrating+strengths+from+BATS%2C+IAP94%2C+and+the+NCAR+land+surface+model%2C+but+has+since+evolved+substantially.+Its+canopy+radiative+transfer+uses+an+improved+two-stream+approximation+with+separate+treatment+of+sunlit+and+shaded+leaves.+Photosynthesis+and+stomatal+conductance+are+also+calculated+separately+for+sunlit+and+shaded+foliage%2C+allowing+simultaneous+exchanges+of+CO2+and+water+vapor.+The+soil+column+is+vertically+resolved+with+multiple+soil+layers+and+snow+layers%2C+enabling+more+realistic+simulation+of+soil+thermal+and+hydrological+states.+Important+parameterizations+include+organic-matter+thermal+insulation%2C+supercooled+liquid+water+in+frozen+soils%2C+frost+and+thaw+fronts%2C+vertical+soil+organic+carbon+mixing%2C+and+carbon%E2%80%93nitrogen+interactions.++In+this+version%2C+CoLM+is+notable+for+its+expanded+role+within+Earth+system+modeling.+It+includes+deep+soil+representation+for+permafrost+and+active-layer+dynamics%2C+anthropogenic+water+use%2C+riverine+nitrogen+discharge+and+transport%2C+and+coupling+with+a+dynamic+global+vegetation+model+that+represents+plant+functional+types%2C+vegetation+establishment%2C+and+fire+disturbance.+These+developments+make+CoLM+suitable+not+only+for+surface+climate+simulation%2C+but+also+for+studies+of+terrestrial+ecosystems%2C+carbon%E2%80%93nitrogen+feedbacks%2C+permafrost+processes%2C+and+human+impacts+on+land+hydrology+and+biogeochemistry.&code_base=)

- [colm2024](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+colm2024&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FBAMS-84-8-1013+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-18-6517-2025+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2025GL116015+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1038%2Fs41597-025-04729-y+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1007%2Fs00376-024-3338-0+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2024JD041520+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2024JD041338+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fessd-17-517-2025+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2023GL107059+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fessd-17-117-2025+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2022MS003567+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.3390%2Frs15071780+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2022GL101754+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2021WR031589+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.3390%2Ff12060722+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001723+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019WR025368+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001784+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.agrformet.2019.02.006&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22CoLM%22&description=CoLM2024+is+a+comprehensive+land-surface+simulation+platform+that+integrates+a+model+system%2C+data+sets%2C+and+performance+evaluation+in+a+single+framework.+It+is+designed+to+support+high-resolution%2C+multi-scale+land+modeling+and+coupling+with+weather%2C+climate%2C+and+Earth-system+models.++Its+main+simulated+processes+include+surface+energy+and+water+exchanges%2C+radiation+transfer%2C+turbulent+fluxes%2C+canopy+interception%2C+vegetation+hydraulics%2C+soil+water+and+heat+transport%2C+hydrology+and+routing%2C+biogeochemical+cycling%2C+fire%2C+ozone+ecological+stress%2C+urban+processes%2C+crop+growth%2C+and+atmospheric+forcing+downscaling.+These+process+modules+make+CoLM2024+suitable+for+studies+ranging+from+point-scale+land-atmosphere+exchange+to+regional+and+global+environmental+change.++The+key+physics+and+parameterizations+have+been+substantially+upgraded.+CoLM2024+introduces+three-dimensional+vegetation+shortwave+and+longwave+radiation+schemes%2C+SNICAR-based+snow+radiative+transfer%2C+and+improved+two-stream+vegetation+radiation.+It+strengthens+turbulence+formulations+across+dense-to-sparse+canopy+conditions%2C+adds+multi-layer+canopy+interception%2C+and+replaces+empirical+water-stress+treatment+with+a+Darcy-law-based+plant+hydraulics+scheme.+Hydrology+is+also+modernized+through+a+variable-saturation+soil+moisture+solver+and+scale-dependent+lateral+flow%2Frouting+treatments%2C+including+a+modular+and+bidirectionally+coupled+CaMa-Flood+implementation.++Notable+features+of+this+version+include+new+grid+structures+beyond+latitude%E2%80%93longitude+grids%2C+namely+unstructured+grids+and+basin-unit+grids%3B+new+vegetation+subgrid+representations+based+on+PFTs+and+plant+communities+%28PC%29%3B+substantially+updated+high-resolution+global+data+sets+for+land+cover%2C+soil%2C+vegetation%2C+hydrology%2C+urban+areas%2C+and+rivers%3B+and+improved+portability%2C+parallel+performance%2C+and+namelist-based+configurability.+In+addition%2C+CoLM2024+adds+an+accelerated+biogeochemistry+spin-up+method%2C+urban+3D+radiative-transfer+and+turbulence+schemes%2C+crop+modules%2C+fire+and+ozone-stress+parameterizations%2C+and+machine-learning-assisted+forcing+downscaling.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FCoLM-SYSU%2FCoLM%2Ftree%2FCoLM2024-CMIP7)

- [fesim-2-7](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+fesim-2-7&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-8-1747-2015+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-10-765-2017+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-335-2022&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22fesim%22&description=Main+processes+simulated+%28additions+only%29+Within+FESOM+2.7%2C+FESIM+2.7+gains+tighter+coupling+to+an+explicit+iceberg+drift-and-melt+module+%28with+wave-induced+erosion%29%2C+so+that+calved+icebergs+are+treated+as+an+external+freshwater%2Fheat+source+distinct+from+the+resolved+sea-ice+cover.+Consistent+handling+of+land-ice+and+ice-shelf+freshwater+fluxes+alongside+sea-ice+melt%2Fgrowth+is+hardened%2C+including+the+cold-start+pathway+used+for+transient+passive+tracers+%28CFCs%2C+SF6%2C+radiocarbon%29+and+water+isotopes+%28%CE%B418O%2C+%CE%B4D%29+that+interact+with+the+ice%E2%80%93ocean+interface.++Key+physics+%2F+parameterisations+%28new+or+upgraded%29+Continued+use+of+the+modified+elastic%E2%80%93viscous%E2%80%93plastic+%28mEVP%29+rheology+on+collocated+triangular+vertex+meshes%2C+with+subcycle+counts+exposed+via+namelist.+Flux-corrected+transport+advection+of+ice+and+snow+mean+thicknesses+and+concentration%2C+unchanged+in+formulation+but+cleaned+up+at+the+interface+to+the+restructured+CVmix+vertical-mixing+layer+of+the+host+ocean.+Improved+ice%E2%80%93ocean%E2%80%93ice-shelf+cavity+consistency%3A+rigid-lid%2Ffree-surface+treatment+under+cavities%2C+water-flux+closure+at+the+ice+base%2C+and+a+vertical-velocity+reset+that+participates+in+the+CFLz+check.+Calving%2Fenthalpy+logic+reworked+for+stability+under+frequent+restarts+in+coupled+IFS-based+configurations.++Notable+features+of+this+version+First-phase+OpenACC+port%3A+the+FESIM+dynamical+kernels+run+alongside+the+FESOM+2.7+dynamical+core+on+GPUs+while+retaining+the+existing+MPI+CPU+path.+CMIP7-oriented+sea-ice+diagnostics+exposed+via+the+ldiag_cmor+diagnostic+layer%2C+with+0-dimensional+global+metrics+written+one+file+per+simulated+year.+Asynchronous+parallel+sea-ice+output+through+the+MultIO+2.6+back-end%2C+in+addition+to+the+native+and+XIOS+paths.+Coupled-system+robustness+improvements+relevant+to+sea+ice%3A+corrected+wind+coupling+at+the+ice+surface%2C+reproducibility+under+frequent+restarts%2C+and+reduced+coupling+memory+footprint.+Build+%26+test+infrastructure%3A+ecbundle+support%2C+multi-environment+CI%2C+and+ctest+regression+tests+that+exercise+cavity+and+iceberg+setups+together+with+the+sea-ice+component.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FFESOM%2Ffesom2%2Freleases%2Ftag%2F2.7.0)

- [fesim2](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+fesim2&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.jcp.2020.110086+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-8-1747-2015&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22%22&description=1.+The+FESIM2+sea-ice+component+simulates+sea-ice+dynamics.+Sea+ice+thermodynamics+%28heat+transfer+through+sea+ice%2C+melting%2C+freezing+etc%29+is+handled+by+the+atmosphere+model+ICON-A+on+the+atmosphere+grid.+2.+FESIM2+solves+the+elastic-viscous-plastic+%28EVP%29+equations+for+sea+ice+evolution.+FESIM2+operates+with+a+single+sea-ice+layer+%28i.e.+there+is+no+%22vertical+grid%22%29.+3.+Fine-tuning+of+the+ocean+heat+content+was+done+using+the+parameters+governing+sea+ice+albedo&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.dkrz.de%2Ficon%2Ficon-model%2F-%2Ftree%2Frelease-2025.10-public%3Fref_type%3Dheads)

- [fesom-2-7](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+fesom-2-7&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-10-765-2017+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4875-2019+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-15-335-2022+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-3991-2019&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22fesom%22&description=1.+Main+processes+simulated+%28additions+only%29+Adds+an+explicit+iceberg+drift-and-melt+module+%28with+wave-induced+erosion%29+that+can+run+together+with+active+ice-shelf+cavities.+Transient+passive+tracers+%28CFCs%2C+SF6%2C+radiocarbon%29+and+water+isotopes+%28%CE%B418O%2C+%CE%B4D%29+are+supported+as+production+features%2C+including+consistent+cold-start+and+land-ice+flux+handling.++2.+Key+physics+%2F+parameterisations+%28new+or+upgraded%29+Combined+harmonic+%2B+biharmonic+momentum+viscosity+as+a+single+namelist-selectable+closure.+Dynamic+kinetic-energy+backscatter%2C+including+advection+of+the+unresolved-eddy-kinetic-energy+variable.+Restructured+CVmix+interface%2C+unified+across+vertical-mixing+branches.+Hardened+ice-shelf+cavity+treatment%3A+rigid-lid%2Ffree-surface+consistency%2C+water-flux+closure%2C+and+vertical-velocity+reset+for+the+CFLz+check.+Updated+global-tides+module.++3.+Notable+features+of+this+version+First+phase+of+OpenACC+port%3A+the+dynamical+core+can+run+on+GPUs+alongside+the+existing+MPI+CPU+path.+CMIP7-oriented+diagnostics+via+ldiag_cmor%2C+producing+0-dimensional+global+diagnostics+with+one+file+per+simulated+year.+MultIO+2.6+output+back-end%2C+providing+asynchronous+parallel+I%2FO+in+addition+to+the+native+and+XIOS+paths.+Coupled-system+robustness+for+IFS-based+configurations%3A+reproducibility+under+frequent+restarts%2C+corrected+wind+coupling%2C+reworked+calving%2Fenthalpy+logic%2C+and+reduced+coupling+memory+footprint.+Build+%26+test+infrastructure%3A+ecbundle+support%2C+separable+mesh-partitioner+build%2C+multi-environment+CI%2C+ctest+regression+tests+including+cavity+and+iceberg+setups%2C+and+auto-download+of+standard+test+meshes.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FFESOM%2Ffesom2%2Freleases%2Ftag%2F2.7.0)

- [gamil3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+gamil3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2020JD032574&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22%22&description=GAMIL3+is+the+atmospheric+component+of+the+FGOALS-g3.5+coupled+climate+system+model%2C+developed+by+the+Institute+of+Atmospheric+Physics+%28IAP%29%2C+Chinese+Academy+of+Sciences+%28CAS%29.+1.++Main+processes+simulated%3A+-+Global+atmospheric+circulation%2C+including+large-scale+dynamics%2C+and+radiation+processes.+-+Full+treatment+of+moist+convection%2C+boundary+layer+processes%2C+and+cloud+microphysics.+2.++Key+physics%2Fparameterizations%3A+-+Updated+Zhang-McFarlane+convection+scheme+with+modifications+for+tropical+convection.+-+Improved+two-moment+cloud+microphysics+and+boundary+layer+turbulence+scheme.+-+Hybrid+sigma-pressure+vertical+coordinates+with+26+levels+up+to+~2.194+hPa+%2842+km%29.+3.++Notable+features%3A+-+Uses+a+2.0%C2%B0+%C3%97+2.0%C2%B0+regular+latitude-longitude+grid+in+the+horizontal.+-+Coupled+to+the+CAS-LSM+land+model%2C+LICOM3+ocean+model%2C+and+Los+Alamos+sea+ice+model+within+FGOALS-g3.5.+-+Optimized+for+long-term+climate+simulations+and+CMIP7+experiments.+-+The+freshwater+exchange+process+between+river+model+and+the+ocean+model+employs+the+nearest+mapping+method+rather+than+the+area+conservative+mapping+method%2C+as+the+former+ensures+that+the+ocean+sufficiently+receives+the+riverine+freshwater+input.&code_base=private)

- [gelato](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+gelato&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=GELATO&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001683&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22gelato%22&description=Global+Experimental+Leads+and+sea+ice+for+ATmosphere+and+Ocean.&code_base=private)

- [giss-atmospheric-model-v3-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+giss-atmospheric-model-v3-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdx.doi.org%2F10.1002%2F2013MS000265+https%3A%2F%2Fdx.doi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS002025&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22%22&description=GISS+Atmospheric+Model.+Flexible+model+top+%280.1+hPa+or+0.002+hPa%29%2C+flexible+composition+%28fixed%2C+one-moment-aerosol%2C+MATRIX+aerosol%2C+w%2F+or+w%2Fo+G-PUCCINI+chemistry%29.+Focus+on+response+to+diverse+climate+forcing+across+range+of+time+scales.+v3+is+based+on+a+cubed+sphere+grid.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.giss.nasa.gov%2Ftools%2FmodelE%2F)

- [giss-ocean-model](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+giss-ocean-model&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdx.doi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS002025&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22%22&description=GISS+Ocean+model.+Non-boussinesq%2C+mass+conserving%2C+natural+boundary+conditions%2C+p-star+vertical+coordinate+%28like+z-star+but+in+mass%29.+Variable+resolution%2C+standard+lat-lon+grid+or+stretched+in+latitude+for+additional+tropical+detail.+Focused+on+climate+responses+to+multiple+forcings.+Optional+ocean-biogeochemistry+and+full+carbon+cycle.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.giss.nasa.gov%2Ftools%2FmodelE%2F)

- [glomap-mode](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+glomap-mode&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-3-519-2010&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22glomap-mode%22&description=GLOMAP-mode+is+the+Global+Model+of+Aerosol+Processes%2C+a+modal+global+aerosol+microphysics+model+for+UKCA.+GLOMAP-mode+simulates+the+multi-component+global+aerosol%2C+resolving+sulfate%2C+sea-salt%2C+dust%2C+black+carbon+%28BC%29+and+particulate+organic+matter+%28POM%29%2C+the+latter+including+primary+and+biogenic+secondary+POM.+Aerosol+processes+are+simulated+in+a+size-resolved+manner+including+primary+emissions%2C+secondary+particle+formation+by+binary+homogeneous+nucleation+of+sulfuric+acid+and+water%2C+particle+growth+by+coagulation%2C+condensation+and+cloud-processing+and+removal+by+dry+deposition%2C+in-cloud+and+below-cloud+scavenging.&code_base=private)

- [hadam3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+hadam3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&name=HadAM3&references=&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22hadam%22&description=HadAM3+is+the+atmospheric+component+of+HadCM3%2C+a+coupled+atmosphere-ocean+general+circulation+model+developed+at+the+UK+Met+Office+Hadley+Centre.&code_base=none)

- [hd-hydrological-discharge](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+hd-hydrological-discharge&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1007%2Fs003820050205+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2000JD900568&component=%22%22&family=%22%22&description=1.+The+HD+model+simulates+the+global+river+discharge.+2.+HD+separates+the+lateral+water+flow+into+the+three+flow+processes+of+overland+flow%2C+baseflow%2C+and+riverflow.+Overland+flow+and+baseflow+represent+the+fast+and+slow+lateral+flow+processes+within+a+grid+box%2C+while+riverflow+represents+the+lateral+flow+between+grid+boxes.+3.+HD+assumes+%22rivers%22+to+exist+in+Antarctica+and+Greenland%2C+to+compensate+for+the+absence+of+glacial+flow+in+the+ICON+model.+This+assumption+is+necessary+to+close+the+water+budget.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.dkrz.de%2Ficon%2Ficon-model%2F-%2Ftree%2Frelease-2025.10-public%3Fref_type%3Dheads++%23%23+References++Hagemann%2C+S.%2C+D%C3%BCmenil%2C+L.+A+parametrization+of+the+lateral+waterflow+for+the+global+scale.+Climate+Dynamics+14%2C+17%E2%80%9331+%281997%29.+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1007%2Fs003820050205+Hagemann%2C+S.%2C+and+L.+D.+Gates+%282001%29%2C+Validation+of+the+hydrological+cycle+of+ECMWF+and+NCEP+reanalyses+using+the+MPI+hydrological+discharge+model%2C+J.+Geophys.+Res.%2C+106%28D2%29%2C+1503%E2%80%931510%2C+doi%3A10.1029%2F2000JD900568.)

- [iap-agcm5-0](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+iap-agcm5-0&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2020MS002210&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22IAP-AGCM%22&description=The+current+version%2C+IAP+AGCM5.0%2C+is+the+fifth-generation+global+grid-point+atmospheric+model+developed+by+the+Institute+of+Atmospheric+Physics%2C+Chinese+Academy+of+Sciences.+It+uses+a+finite-difference+dynamical+core+with+a+terrain-following+%CF%83+coordinate+and+is+designed+to+simulate+large-scale+atmospheric+circulation+and+key+physical+processes%2C+including+convection%2C+clouds%2C+turbulence%2C+radiation%2C+precipitation%2C+aerosol%E2%80%93cloud+interactions%2C+and+orographic+gravity+wave+drag.+Compared+with+earlier+versions%2C+IAP+AGCM5.0+has+evolved+substantially+through+its+distinctive+dynamical+core%2C+increased+lower-tropospheric+vertical+resolution%2C+and+improved+parallel+scalability.+Its+physical+parameterization+suite+builds+on+the+CAM+physics+package%2C+with+major+updates+including+a+two-plume+convection+scheme+for+deep+and+shallow+convection%2C+revised+cloud+macrophysics+and+microphysics%2C+RRTMG+radiation%2C+and+an+anisotropic+orographic+gravity+wave+parameterization.&code_base=)

- [icon-a-1-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+icon-a-1-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.2378+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2018MS001364+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.289+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-10-433-2017&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22%22&description=1.+This+component+simulates+atmospheric+dynamics+and+physics%2C+solving+the+fully+compressible+non-hydrostatic+Navier-Stokes+equations+on+the+sphere+%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.2378%29%2C+using+the+%22NWP%22+physics+package+%28https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.icon-model.org%2Fdocumentation%2Fatmosphere%2Fatmosphere.html%23ref-atmosphere-nwp-physics%29+2.+Key+physics+formulations+include+ecRad+%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2018MS001364%29%2C+the+single-moment+microphysics+scheme+after+Doms+et+al.+%28https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cosmo-model.org%2Fcontent%2Fmodel%2Fcosmo%2FcoreDocumentation%2Fcosmo_physics_5.00.pdf%29%2C+convection+after+Bechtold+et+al.+%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.289%29+and+other+parameterizations.+The+effects+of+aerosols+are+prescribed+using+the+MACv2+simple-plume+scheme+%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-10-433-2017%29.+3.+The+model+uses+a+prescribed+cloud+droplet+number+concentration+climatology+derived+from+satellite+data.+Over+the+Southern+Ocean+and+Antarctica+in+summer%2C+this+climatology+has+been+artificially+increased+to+counteract+a+radiation+bias+resulting+in+an+SST+warm+bias+and+substantial+cumulative+impacts+on+the+ocean+heat+content.+With+this+increase+in+place%2C+designed+to+counteract+insufficient+cloud+cover%2C+the+model+simulates+a+much+decreased+warm+bias+in+the+Southern-Ocean+region.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.dkrz.de%2Ficon%2Ficon-model%2F-%2Ftree%2Frelease-2025.10-public%3Fref_type%3Dheads)

- [icon-o-1-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+icon-o-1-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1029%2F2021MS002952&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22%22&description=1.+This+component+simulates+ocean+physics+and+dynamics.+The+model+is+described+here%3A+https%3A%2F%2Fagupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com%2Fdoi%2F10.1029%2F2021MS002952.+The+model+operates+on+a+triangular+grid+at+a+nominal+20+km+resolution.+The+grid+is+organized+such+that+interior+land+points+have+been+removed+from+the+grid.+The+model+vertical+coordinate+system+is+depth-based+with+a+maximum+depth+of+5900+m.+2.+Key+physics+parameterizations+Physics+parameterizations+are+described+%2F+referenced+by+Korn+et+al.+%28https%3A%2F%2Fagupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com%2Fdoi%2F10.1029%2F2021MS002952%29+for+velocity+dissipation%2C+vertical+mixing%2C+and+eddy+diffusion+and+advection%2C+3.+Notable+features+Care+was+taken+to+increase+resolution+to+the+point+that+the+model+now+operates+in+the+eddy-permitting+domain.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgitlab.dkrz.de%2Ficon%2Ficon-model%2F-%2Ftree%2Frelease-2025.10-public%3Fref_type%3Dheads)

- [ifs-cy36r4-l91](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+ifs-cy36r4-l91&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fgmd.copernicus.org%2Farticles%2F15%2F2973%2F2022%2F++https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ecmwf.int%2Fen%2Felibrary%2F74349-ifs-documentation-cy36r1-part-iii-dynamics-and-numerical-procedures+https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ecmwf.int%2Fen%2Felibrary%2F74350-ifs-documentation-cy36r1-part-iv-physical-processes&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22ifs%22&description=The+%2A%2AIFS+atmospheric%2A%2A+component+is+based+on+a+hydrostatic%2C+semi-Lagrangian%2C+semi-implicit+dynamical+core+withcomputations+alternated+between+spectral+and+reduced+Gaussian+grid-point+representations+at+each+time+step.+Thevertical+discretization+is+based+on+a+hybrid+sigma-pressurecoordinate+which+is+solved+by+using+a+finite-element+scheme.%C2%A0Subgridscale+processes+are+parameterized+in+terms+of+the+resolvedvariables+and+include+representations+of+a%C2%A0%2A%2ARadiation+Scheme%2A%2A%C2%A0%28A+Rapid+Radiative+Transfer+Model+for+shortwave+and+longwave+radiation%2C+including+gas%2C+cloud%2C+and+aerosol+interactions%2C+which+is+critical+for+accurate+surface+and+atmospheric+heating+rates%3B%C2%A0%5BMorcrette+et+al.%2C+2008%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Fjournals.ametsoc.org%2Fview%2Fjournals%2Fmwre%2F136%2F12%2F2008mwr2363.1.pdf%29%29%2C+a%C2%A0%2A%2AConvection+Scheme%2A%2A%C2%A0%28A+mass-flux+approach+that+represents+deep+and+shallow+convection%2C+including+convective+momentum+transport.+It+improves+precipitation+timing+and+intensity+and+is+crucial+for+tropical+and+mid-latitude+weather%3B%C2%A0%5BBechtold+et+al.%2C+2008%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Frmets.onlinelibrary.wiley.com%2Fdoi%2Fabs%2F10.1002%2Fqj.289%29%29%2C+a%C2%A0%2A%2ACloud+Microphysics+Scheme%2A%2A%C2%A0%28A+prognostic+treatment+of+cloud+liquid%2C+ice%2C+rain%2C+snow%2C+and+graupel+with+detailed+microphysical+processes.+It+improves+cloud+cover+and+precipitation+representation%2C+including+mixed-phase+clouds%3B%C2%A0%5BForbes+and+Tompkins%2C+2011%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ecmwf.int%2Fsites%2Fdefault%2Ffiles%2Felibrary%2F2011%2F17431-improved-representation-cloud-and-precipitation.pdf%29%29%2C+a%C2%A0%2A%2ATurbulence+and+Boundary+Layer+Scheme%2A%2A+%28Parameterizing+the+turbulent+mixing+in+the+planetary+boundary+layer%2C+including+non-local+and+local+mixing+processes.+It+influences+the+near-surface+weather+elements+like+temperature%2C+humidity%2C+and+wind%3B%C2%A0%5BK%C3%B6hler+et+al.%2C+2011%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.713%29%29%2C+subgrid-scale+orographic+drag+%28%5BBeljaars+et+al.%2C+2004%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Frmets.onlinelibrary.wiley.com%2Fdoi%2Fabs%2F10.1256%2Fqj.03.73%29%29%2C+and+non-orographicgravity+wave+drag+%28Orr+et+al.%2C+2010%29.+See+e.g.%C2%A0%5BRoberts+et+al.%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Fgmd.copernicus.org%2Farticles%2F11%2F3681%2F2018%2F%29+%282018%2C+section+2.1%29.++The%C2%A0%2A%2ALand+Surface+Scheme%2A%2A%C2%A0in%C2%A0%2A%2AHTESSEL%2A%2A%C2%A0represents+vertical+transfers+of+water+and+energy+using+four+vertical+layers+to+represent+soil+temperature+and+moisture.+The+model+evaluates+the+land+surface+response+to+the+atmospheric+forcing+and+estimates+the+surface+water+and+energy+fluxes+along+with+the+temporal+evolution+of+the+snowpack%2C+soil+temperature%2C+and+moisture.+At+the+interface+between+the+surface+and+the+atmosphere%2C+each+grid+box+is+divided+into+fractions+%28tiles%29%2C+with+up+to+six+fractions+over+land+%28bare+ground%2C+low+and+high+vegetation%2C+intercepted+water%2C+shaded+and+exposed+snow%29.+Each+fraction+has+its+own+properties+defining+separate+heat+and+water+fluxes+used+in+the+energy-balance+equation+solved+for+the+tile+skin+temperature.+The+snow+scheme+in+HTESSEL+is+an+energy-+and+mass-balance+model+that+represents+an+additional+layer+on+top+of+the+upper+soil+layer%2C+with+independent+prognostic+thermal+and+mass+contents.+See%C2%A0%5BDutra+et+al.%5D%28https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2F2010JHM1249.1%29%C2%A0%282010%2C+section2%29.&code_base=private)

- [jules-gl9](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+jules-gl9&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-4-677-2011+%28Best+et+al.+2011%29+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-19-1473-2026+%28Willett+et+al+2026%29+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fegusphere-2026-1676+%28Rostron+et+al+2026%29&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22jules%22&description=JULES+is+the+Joint+UK+Land+Environment+Simulator+%28Best+et+al.+2011%29+.+This+was+developed+from+the+Met+Office+Surface+Exchange+Scheme+%28MOSES%29.+It+can+be+used+as+a+stand+alone+land+surface+model+driven+by+observed+forcing+data%2C+or+coupled+to+an+atmospheric+global+circulation+model.+The+configuration+used+is+documented+by+Willett+et+al+2026+for+GA8+with+changes+in+the+calculation+of+surface+albedo+to+improve+agreement+with+observations+and+remove+the+previous+scaling+to+climatology%2C+and+the+soil+hydrology+parameterisation+to+improve+drainage+to+lower+soil+layers+%28Rostron+et+al+2026%29&code_base=private)

- [jules-v5-3](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+jules-v5-3&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-4-677-2011&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22jules%22&description=The+land+surface+component+simulates+physical%2C+hydrological%2C+and+biogeochemical+processes+at+the+land+surface%2C+including+exchanges+of+energy%2C+water%2C+and+carbon+with+the+atmosphere.&code_base=private)

- [jules-vn5-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+jules-vn5-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-4-677-2011+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-4-701-2011+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-14-2161-2021&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22jules%22&description=The+Joint+UK+Land+Environment+Simulator+%28JULES%29+is+the+land+surface+scheme+of+the+UK+Earth+System+Model+%28UKESM%29.++++JULES+vn5.1+incorporates+an+implementation+of+the+terrestrial+nitrogen+cycle.+The+inclusion+of+a+prognostic+land+N+scheme+marks+a+step+forward+in+functionality+and+realism+for+the+JULES+and+UKESM+models.&code_base=private)

- [lim2](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+lim2&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.ocemod.2009.01.004&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22lim%22&description=LIM+is+a+numerical+model+of+sea+ice+designed+for+climate+studies+and+operational+oceanography+%28https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cmcc.it%2Fmodels%2Flim%29.++The+LIM2+sea-ice+model+with+parameters+adjusted+was+used+in+CanESM5+%28Swart+et+al.+2019%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-4823-2019%29&code_base=)

- [lpj-guess-4-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+lpj-guess-4-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.8065736&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22lpj-guess%22&description=1.+Main+processes+simulated+%28additions+only%29+Adds+methane+emissions+from+natural+wetlands+and+peatlands+as+a+standard+feature%2C+lifting+them+from+earlier+branch-only+configurations+into+the+main+release.+Emissions+of+nitrogen-based+trace+gases+%28N%E2%82%82O%2C+NO%2C+NH%E2%82%83%29+from+soils+are+simulated+in+the+coupled+C%E2%80%93N+cycle.++2.+Key+physics+%2F+parameterisations+%28new+or+upgraded%29+New+process-based+wildfire+scheme+as+the+default+fire+module%2C+replacing+the+previous+simpler+default.+Peatland-specific+plant+functional+types+and+a+dedicated+peatland+hydrology+integrated+into+the+main+code+path.+Multi-layer+soil+temperature+and+freeze%E2%80%93thaw+scheme+available+in+the+standard+configuration%2C+enabling+permafrost+dynamics+outside+the+dedicated+arctic+branches.+Soil+nitrogen+chemistry+extended+to+support+consistent+trace-gas+production+alongside+leaching+and+plant%E2%80%93microbial+competition.++3.+Notable+features+of+this+version+First+release+of+LPJ-GUESS%2C+available+directly+from+the+project+website.+Consolidates+previously+branch-specific+developments+%28high-latitude+soil+physics%2C+methane%2C+advanced+fire%29+into+a+single%2C+supported+mainline+code+base.&code_base=private)

- [m-sim](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+m-sim&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.accre.2021.07.003%3B+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-14-4891-2021%3B+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1007%2Fs00376-022-1316-y%3B+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Ftc-18-1215-2024%3B+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.3390%2Frs16091494%3B++https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.ocemod.2025.102640&component=%22sea_ice%22&family=%22%22&description=M-SIM+is+a+multi-scale+sea+ice+model.+It+includes+a+suite+of+new+and+improved+thermodynamic+parameterizations+that+comprehensively+represent+processes+at+surface%2C+interior%2C+side%2C+and+bottom+of+sea+ice.+These+parameterizations+include+a+maximum-entropy-production+scheme+for+air-ice+turbulent+heat+fluxes%2C+a+melt-pond+size+distribution+function%2C+prognostic+sea-ice+salinity+and+its+thermodynamic+effects%2C+effects+of+ice-microstructure+based+inherent+optical+properties%2C+floe+size+and+thickness+joint+distribution+and+lateral+melting%2C+and+turbulent+heat+and+salinity+flux+exchanges+across+the+thin+ice-ocean+transition+layer.++In+terms+of+dynamics%2C+M-SIM+retains+the+core+CICE6+capabilities%2C+including+the+Elastic-Viscous-Plastic+%28EVP%29+and+Elastic-Anisotropic-Plastic+%28EAP%29+solvers+and+the+multi-category+ice+thickness+distribution+%28ITD%29+transport+framework.+M-SIM+further+introduces+important+process-based+extensions%2C+including+sea+ice-wave+interactions+and+floe+size+evolution%2C+and+lagrangian+tracking+of+sea+ice.+Together%2C+these+developments+enable+M-SIM+to+provide+more+complete+and+physically+consistent+description+of+coupled+thermodynamic-dynamic+sea-ice+evolution.&code_base=)

- [masingar-mk-3r2](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+masingar-mk-3r2&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.20839616+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.2151%2Fjmsj.2019-051+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1186%2Fs40645-020-00348-w&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22%22&description=The+aerosol+component+model+used+in+MRI-ESM3.4+%28Deushi+et+al.%2C+2026%29+for+CMIP7+is+the+Model+of+Aerosol+Species+in+the+Global+Atmosphere+mark-3+revision+2+%28MASINGAR+mk-3r2%29%2C+an+updated+version+of+MASINGAR+mk-2r4-climate+used+in+MRI-ESM2.0+for+CMIP6+%28Yukimoto+et+al.%2C+2019%3B+Oshima+et+al.%2C+2020%29.+The+aerosol+model+calculates+the+physical+and+chemical+processes+of+atmospheric+aerosols%2C+such+as+emission%2C+transport%2C+diffusion%2C+chemical+reactions%2C+and+dry+and+wet+deposition.+The+model+treats+non-sea-salt+sulfate%2C+black+carbon%2C+organic+carbon%2C+sea+salt%2C+mineral+dust%2C+and+aerosol+precursor+gases.+The+model+is+interactively+coupled+with+the+other+component+models+in+MRI-ESM3.4+using+a+coupler.&code_base=)

- [matrix](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+matrix&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdx.doi.org%2F10.5194%2Facp-8-6003-2008+https%3A%2F%2Fdx.doi.org%2F10.1029%2F2019MS001978&component=%22aerosol%22&family=%22%22&description=MATRIX+aerosols.+Mode+based+aerosol+code+for+climate+change+applications.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.giss.nasa.gov%2Ftools%2FmodelE%2F)

- [metum-ga7-1](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+metum-ga7-1&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5194%2Fgmd-12-1909-2019&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22metum%22&description=We+describe+Global+Atmosphere+7.0+and+Global+Land+7.0+%28GA7.0%2FGL7.0%29%2C+the+latest+science+configurations+of+the+Met+Office+Unified+Model+%28UM%29+and+the+Joint+UK+Land+Environment+Simulator+%28JULES%29+land+surface+model+developed+for+use+across+weather+and+climate+timescales.+GA7.0+and+GL7.0+include+incremental+developments+and+targeted+improvements+that%2C+between+them%2C+address+four+critical+errors+identified+in+previous+configurations%3A+excessive+precipitation+biases+over+India%2C+warm+and+moist+biases+in+the+tropical+tropopause+layer+%28TTL%29%2C+a+source+of+energy+non-conservation+in+the+advection+scheme+and+excessive+surface+radiation+biases+over+the+Southern+Ocean.+They+also+include+two+new+parametrisations%2C+namely+the+UK+Chemistry+and+Aerosol+%28UKCA%29+GLOMAP-mode+%28Global+Model+of+Aerosol+Processes%29+aerosol+scheme+and+the+JULES+multi-layer+snow+scheme%2C+which+improve+the+fidelity+of+the+simulation+and+were+required+for+inclusion+in+the+Global+Atmosphere%2FGlobal+Land+configurations+ahead+of+the+6th+Coupled+Model+Intercomparison+Project+%28CMIP6%29.++In+addition%2C+we+describe+the+GA7.1+branch+configuration%2C+which+reduces+an+overly+negative+anthropogenic+aerosol+effective+radiative+forcing+%28ERF%29+in+GA7.0+whilst+maintaining+the+quality+of+simulations+of+the+present-day+climate.+GA7.1%2FGL7.0+will+form+the+physical+atmosphere%2Fland+component+in+the+HadGEM3%E2%80%93GC3.1+and+UKESM1+climate+model+submissions+to+the+CMIP6.&code_base=private)

- [metum-ga9](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+metum-ga9&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=%22The+Met+Office+Unified+Model+Global+Atmosphere+and+Land+9.0+configuration%22+%28Willet+et+al.+in+prep%29%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FJAS-D-16-0165.1+%28Furtado+et+al.+2017%29%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FMWR-D-20-0224.1+%28Weverberg+et+al.+2021a%29%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FMWR-D-20-0230.1+%28Weverberg+et+al.+2021b%29%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.3807+%28Williams+et+al.+2020%29&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22metum%22&description=The+Global+Atmosphere+9+configuration+of+the+Unified+Model.++The+main+new+developments+in+this+configuration+are%3A+-+The+introduction+of+a+prognostic-based+convective+entrainment+rate+%28Willet+et+al.%2C+submitted%29.+-+Alignment+of+mid-+and+deep-level+convection+%28with+deep+convection+subsequently+switched+off%29.+-+A+new+parameterisation+for+riming+%28Furtado+et+al.%2C+2017%29.+-+Bimodal+cloud+initiation+%28Weverberg+et+al.%2C+2021a%2C+b%29.+-+Several+changes+to+improve+the+large-scale+circulation+%28Williams+et+al.%2C+2020%29.&code_base=private)

- [metum-ga9a](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+metum-ga9a&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fgmd.copernicus.org%2Farticles%2F19%2F1473%2F2026%2F+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FJAS-D-16-0165.1+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FMWR-D-20-0224.1+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1175%2FMWR-D-20-0230.1+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.3807+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1002%2Fqj.4660+https%3A%2F%2Frmets.onlinelibrary.wiley.com%2Fdoi%2F10.1002%2Fqj.4781&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22metum%22&description=The+Global+Atmosphere+9+configuration+of+the+Unified+Model.+The+main+new+developments+in+this+configuration+are%3A++The+introduction+of+a+prognostic-based+convective+entrainment+rate+%28Willet+et+al.%2C+2026%29.+A+new+parameterisation+for+riming+%28Furtado+et+al.%2C+2017%29.+Bimodal+cloud+initiation+%28Weverberg+et+al.%2C+2021a%2C+b%29.+Several+changes+to+improve+the+large-scale+circulation+%28Williams+et+al.%2C+2020%29.++The+configuration+of+MetUM-GA9a+used+here+is+different+from+GA9+due+to+the+incorporation+of+the+CoMorph+convection+scheme+%28Lavender+et+al.%2C+2024%29+in+its+A9+configuration+%28Lock+et+al.%2C+2024%29+with+associated+changes.&code_base=private)

- [mom5](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+mom5&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.19200080%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1016%2Fj.ocemod.2017.03.016%2C+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.1071%2FES19035&component=%22ocean%22&family=%22%22&description=Version+5+of+the+Modular+Ocean+Model+%28MOM5%2C+Griffies+2012%29+is+a+hydrostatic+generalized+level+coordinate+numerical+ocean+model+with+mass-conserving+non-Boussinesq+or+volume-conserving+Boussinesq+kinematics+on+an+Arakawa+B-grid.+ACCESS-ESM1.6+uses+a+Boussinesq+configuration+of+MOM5+with+a+free+surface+and+%E2%80%98z-star%E2%80%99+vertical+coordinates+which+spread+changes+associated+with+the+free+surface+throughout+the+water+column.+The+grid+resolution%2C+bathymetry+and+parameterisations+are+unchanged+from+ACCESS-ESM1.5+%28Ziehn+et+al.%2C+2020%29.&code_base=https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2FACCESS-NRI%2FMOM5%2Freleases%2Ftag%2F2025.05.000)

- [mri-agcm4-4-land-surface](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+mri-agcm4-4-land-surface&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.20839616+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.2151%2Fjmsj.2019-051+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.2151%2Fjmsj.2012-A02&component=%22land-surface%22&family=%22%22&description=The+land+surface+physics+component+of+MRI-ESM3.4+%28Deushi+et+al.%2C+2026%29+uses+the+improved+Simple+Biosphere+model+%28iSiB%29%2C+derived+from+the+Japan+Meteorological+Agency%E2%80%99s+global+model%2C+replacing+HAL+used+in+MRI-ESM2.0+%28Yukimoto+et+al.%2C+2019%29.+The+land+surface+model+represents+land+surface+processes+and+simulates+exchanges+of+momentum%2C+heat%2C+water+vapor%2C+and+radiation+between+the+land+surface+and+the+atmosphere.+The+land+carbon+cycle+component+of+MRI+ESM3.4+is+the+dynamic+global+vegetation%E2%80%93wildfire+model+MRI-LPJ-LCF+version+1.0.+This+model+simulates+land+carbon+budgets+and+natural+and+human-induced+fire+activities.+The+model+uses+daily+climate+forcing+provided+by+the+atmospheric+component+of+MRI-ESM3.4.+The+human-induced+fire+ignitions+are+represented+as+a+function+of+population+density.+The+establishment+of+grass+plant+functional+types+is+calculated+daily%2C+whereas+the+allocation+and+establishment+of+tree+plant+functional+types+are+calculated+annually.+Leaf+phenology+is+calculated+daily+using+past+information%2C+such+as+temperature+and+day+length.+Land+use+is+simplified+into+natural+and+agricultural+tiles%2C+with+associated+carbon+flux+adjustments.+MRI-ESM3.4+incorporates+GRiveT2%2C+an+updated+river+and+lake+model%2C+and+a+simple+glacier+model+%28SMIST%29%2C+both+inherited+from+MRI-CGCM3+%28Yukimoto+et+al.%2C+2012%29%2C+with+a+major+improvement+for+representing+large+lakes+such+as+the+Caspian+Sea.&code_base=)

- [mri-agcm4-4](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+mri-agcm4-4&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.20839616+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.11483%2Fmritechrepo.64+https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jma.go.jp%2Fjma%2Fjma-eng%2Fjma-center%2Fnwp%2Foutline2019-nwp%2Findex.htm&component=%22atmosphere%22&family=%22%22&description=The+atmospheric+component+of+MRI-ESM3.4+%28Deushi+et+al.%2C+2026%29+is+the+MRI+Atmospheric+General+Circulation+Model+version+4.4+%28MRI-AGCM4.4%29%2C+an+updated+version+of+MRI-AGCM3.5+%28Yukimoto+et+al.%2C+2011%29.+MRI-AGCM4.4+is+a+global+spectral+atmospheric+model+that+uses+a+semi-implicit+semi-Lagrangian+scheme+and+a+sigma-pressure+hybrid+vertical+coordinate+system.+The+model+resolution+for+the+CMIP7+experiments+is+TL159L100%2C+corresponding+to+approximately+120+km+horizontally+and+100+vertical+levels%2C+compared+with+80+vertical+levels+in+CMIP6.+The+dynamical+framework+has+been+updated+based+on+the+Japan+Meteorological+Agency%E2%80%99s+Global+Spectral+Model+version+1705+%28Japan+Meteorological+Agency%2C+2019%29.+The+physical+schemes+include+updates+to+cloud+macro-+and+microphysics%2C+cumulus+convection%2C+radiation%2C+subgrid+orographic+and+non-orographic+gravity+wave+drag%2C+and+the+skin+SST+scheme%2C+as+well+as+a+newly+introduced+EDMF+boundary+layer+scheme.&code_base=)

- [mri-ccm3-2](https://github.com/WCRP-CMIP/Essential-Model-Documentation/issues/new?template=model_component.yml&title=Modify%3A+Model+Component%3A+mri-ccm3-2&issue_kind=%22Modify%22&references=https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.5281%2Fzenodo.20839616+https%3A%2F%2Fdoi.org%2F10.2151%2Fjmsj.2019-051&component=%22atmospheric-chemistry%22&family=%22%22&description=The+atmospheric+chemistry+component+of+MRI-ESM3.4+%28Deushi+et+al.%2C+2026%29+uses+the+MRI+Chemistry+Climate+Model+version+3.2+%28MRI-CCM3.2%29%2C+which+simulates+ozone+and+other+trace+gases+in+the+troposphere+and+middle+atmosphere.+MRI-CCM3.2+is+an+updated+version+of+MRI-CCM2.1%2C+compared+with+MRI-ESM2.0+%28Yukimoto+et+al.%2C+2019%29.+In+the+simulations%2C+meteorological+fields+and+aerosol+surface+area+density+are+provided+to+MRI-CCM3.2+from+the+interactively+coupled+atmosphere+component+MRI-AGCM4.4+and+aerosol+component+MASINGAR+mk-3r2%2C+respectively.+In+turn%2C+ozone+and+methane+concentrations+are+supplied+to+MRI-AGCM4.4%2C+while+concentrations+of+HO%E2%82%93+and+O%E2%82%93+species+are+supplied+to+MASINGAR+mk-3r2.&code_base=)
